title: 'Wildy unaffordable' shared ownership scheme leaves buyers exposed to costs
description: For many, the promise of getting a foot on the property ladder has turned into a nightmare.
content:
When twin brothers Riccardo and Simone Bertagna bought a share of a three-bedroom flat in Seven Sisters, north London, they told me they felt "proud".
"It felt good. I felt I achieved something," says 35‑year‑old Riccardo.
They bought a 25% stake in ... [6720 chars]

title: How a patient stepped out for a vape and foiled a suicide bomber at Leeds hospital
description: It could have been a case of mass murder, but one man had the presence of mind to convince a terror attacker to abandon his plan.
content:
Nathan Newby stepped outside a hospital for a vape and some fresh air on a winter night - but ended up talking down a suicide bomber after a simple act of kindness.
This "extraordinary, ordinary man", as a judge called him, is today being honoured wi... [6040 chars]

title: NHS waited two days before raising alarm about meningitis outbreak
description: Experts say the wait was indefensible and possibly delayed identification of the outbreak.
content:
The NHS waited two days before raising the alarm about the meningitis outbreak, the BBC has learnt.
The UK Health Security Agency was first alerted of a case by the Queen Elizabeth the Queen Mother Hospital, in Margate, on the afternoon of Friday 13 ... [3685 chars]

title: Public satisfaction with the NHS rises for first time since 2019
description: Wes Streeting set to hail result as proof of progress, but Britons remain frustrated with long waits for GP hospital care
content:
Public satisfaction with the NHS has risen for the first time since 2019, but people remain deeply frustrated with stubbornly long waits to receive GP, A&E or hospital care.
The proportion of voters in Britain satisfied with the way the NHS runs has ... [4059 chars]

title: Man who talked down hospital bomber says would-be attacker asked for a cuddle
description: Nathan Newby set to receive George Medal for stopping a potential atrocity with an act of kindness
content:
A hospital patient who managed to talk a man out of detonating a bomb in a maternity wing said the would-be attacker “asked for a cuddle” before standing down.
